Zetsu/Ketsu import-ready module files

Use either the .json or .txt copy for each module. They contain identical compact JSON.
Start by importing one module at a time on your phone so any app-side import issue is easy to isolate.
SHA256SUMS.txt contains transfer-check hashes for every importable file.

Manifest:
- Royal Road (Text): text/Royal_Road.json / text/Royal_Road.txt
- Baka-Tsuki (Text): text/Baka-Tsuki.json / text/Baka-Tsuki.txt
- NovelFire (Text): text/NovelFire.json / text/NovelFire.txt
- NovelBin (Text): text/NovelBin.json / text/NovelBin.txt
- FreeWebNovel (Text): text/FreeWebNovel.json / text/FreeWebNovel.txt
- ReadNovelFull (Text): text/ReadNovelFull.json / text/ReadNovelFull.txt
- Novgo (Text): text/Novgo.json / text/Novgo.txt
- NovelCool (Text): text/NovelCool.json / text/NovelCool.txt
- Scribble Hub (Text): text/Scribble_Hub.json / text/Scribble_Hub.txt
- WuxiaWorld (Text): text/WuxiaWorld.json / text/WuxiaWorld.txt
- MangaDex (Image): image/MangaDex.json / image/MangaDex.txt
- Asura Scans (Image): image/Asura_Scans.json / image/Asura_Scans.txt
- MangaKatana (Image): image/MangaKatana.json / image/MangaKatana.txt
- Mangapill (Image): image/Mangapill.json / image/Mangapill.txt
- WeebCentral (Image): image/WeebCentral.json / image/WeebCentral.txt
- WEBTOON (Image): image/WEBTOON.json / image/WEBTOON.txt
- Internet Archive Anime (Video): video/Internet_Archive_Anime.json / video/Internet_Archive_Anime.txt
- Wikimedia Commons Anime (Video): video/Wikimedia_Commons_Anime.json / video/Wikimedia_Commons_Anime.txt
- AniLiberty (Video): video/AniLiberty.json / video/AniLiberty.txt
- PeerTube Anime (Video): video/PeerTube_Anime.json / video/PeerTube_Anime.txt
